episodes.title: The Stuff You’ve Never Seen
episodes.previewText: Conan: It’s a tradition here on Friends after every taping for me to hang out with you guys, (They all laugh) talk down the episode umm… The point of this whole thing is what people see in America is: they see Friends, they love the show, it looks like a smooth running machine, but behind the scenes there’s deceit, mistrust, and hate. And I thought, I thought we’d actually take a look at uh, y’know some of these moments where you guys are—there are mistakes. You make mistakes. Jennifer: Once and a while. Lisa: From time to time.

episodes.title: The One Where Monica Gets a New Roommate (The Pilot-The Uncut Version)
episodes.previewText: Monica: There's nothing to tell! He's just some guy I work with! Joey: C'mon, you're going out with the guy! There's gotta be something wrong with him! Chandler: All right Joey, be nice. So does he have a hump? A hump and a hairpiece?

episodes.title: The One With the Sonogram at the End
episodes.previewText: Monica: What you guys don't understand is, for us, kissing is as important as any part of it. Joey: Yeah, right!.......Y'serious? Phoebe: Oh, yeah!

episodes.title: The One With the Thumb
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: (entering) Hi guys! All: Hey, Pheebs! Hi! Ross: Hey. Oh, oh, how'd it go?

episodes.title: The One With George Stephanopoulos
episodes.previewText: Monica: Alright. Phoebe? Phoebe: Okay, okay. If I were omnipotent for a day, I would want, um, world peace, no more hunger, good things for the rain-forest...And bigger boobs! Ross: Yeah, see.. you took mine. Chandler, what about you?

episodes.title: The One With the East German Laundry Detergent
episodes.previewText: With Minor Adjustments by: Dan Silverstein Monica: Would you let it go? It's not that big a deal. Ross: Not that big a deal? It's amazing. Ok, you just reach in there, there's one little maneuver, and bam, a bra right out the sleeve. All right, as far as I'm concerned, there is nothing a guy can do that even comes close. Am I right?

episodes.title: The One With the Butt
episodes.previewText: Rachel: (reading the program) Ooh! Look! Look! Look! Look, there's Joey's picture! This is so exciting! Chandler: You can always spot someone who's never seen one of his plays before. Notice, no fear, no sense of impending doom... Phoebe: The exclamation point in the title scares me. (Gesturing) Y'know, it's not just Freud, it's Freud!

episodes.title: The One With the Blackout
episodes.previewText: Rachel: Everybody? Shh, shhh. Uhhh... Central Perk is proud to present the music of Miss Phoebe Buffay. Phoebe: Hi. Um, I want to start with a song thats about that moment when you suddenly realize what life is all about. OK, here we go. (plays a chord, then the lights go out) OK, thank you very much. Chandler: Oh, great. This is just...

episodes.title: The One Where Nana Dies Twice
episodes.previewText: Shelley: Hey gorgeous, how's it going? Chandler: Dehydrated Japanese noodles under fluorescent lights... does it get better than this? Shelley: Question. You're not dating anybody, are you, because I met somebody who would be perfect for you.

episodes.title: The One Where Underdog Gets Away
episodes.previewText: With Minor Adjustments by: Dan Silverstein Rachel: Terry, I, I, I know that I haven't worked here very long, but I was wondering, do you think it would be possible if I got a $100 advance in my salary? Terry: An advance?

episodes.title: The One With the Monkey
episodes.previewText: Ross: Guys? There's a somebody I'd like you to meet. All: Oooh! Monica: W-wait. What is that?

episodes.title: The One With Mrs. Bing
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: Do you think they have yesterday's daily news? Monica: Why? Phoebe: Just wanna check my horoscope, see if it was right.

episodes.title: The One With the Dozen Lasagnas
episodes.previewText: With Minor Adjustments by: Dan Silverstein Chandler: No-no-no-no, we're done. Monica: Aunt Syl, stop yelling! All I'm saying is that if you had told me vegetarian lasagna, I would have made vegetarian lasagna. (pauses, listens to person on phone) Well, the meat's only every third layer, maybe you could scrape.

episodes.title: The One With the Boobies
episodes.previewText: Rachel: That is it! You just barge in here, you don't knock Chandler: I'm sorry! Rachel: You have no respect for anybody's privacy!

episodes.title: The One With the Candy Hearts
episodes.previewText: With Minor Adjustments by: Eric Aasen Joey: I'm tellin' you Ross, she wants you. Ross: She barely knows me. We just live in the same building.

episodes.title: The One With the Stoned Guy
episodes.previewText: Rachel: (to Joey) Coffee. (Hands it to him.) Joey: Thank you. Rachel: (to Ross) Cappuccino. (Hands it to him.)

episodes.title: The One With Two Parts, part 1
episodes.previewText: With Minot Adjustments by: Tennant Stuart Chandler: This is unbelievable. It’s been like a half an hour. If this was a cartoon, you’d be looking like a ham right about now. Joey: There’s the waitress. Excuse me, Miss. Hello, Miss?

episodes.title: The One With Two Parts, Part 2
episodes.previewText: With Minor Adjustments by: Tennant Stuart Rachel: Ow ow ow. Ow ow ow ow. Ow ow ow. Ow. Ow. Ow. Ow. Monica: Hi. Uh, my friend here was taking down our Christmas lights, and and she fell off the balcony and may have broken her foot or or ankle or something.

episodes.title: The One With All The Poker
episodes.previewText: Ross: Uh, Rach, we're running low on resumes over here. Monica: Do you really want a job with Popular Mechanics? Chandler: Well, if you're gonna work for mechanics, those are the ones to work for.

episodes.title: The One Where the Monkey Gets Away
episodes.previewText: Rachel: Okay, okay, I checked. We have: Earl Grey, English Breakfast, Cinnamon Stick, Camomile, Mint Medley, Blackberry, and.. oh, wait, there's one more, um.. Lemon Soother. You're not the guy that asked for the tea, are you? (Guy shakes his head) Okay. Monica: Mail call, Rachel Green, bunk seven.

episodes.title: The One With the Evil Orthodontist
episodes.previewText: Chandler: I can't believe you would actually say that. I would much rather be Mr.Peanut than Mr.Salty. Joey: No way! Mr.Salty is a sailor, all right, he's got to be, like, thetoughest snack there is. Ross: I don't know, you don't wanna mess with corn nuts. They're craaazy.

episodes.title: The One With The Fake Monica
episodes.previewText: Joey: How could someone get a hold of your credit card number? Monica: I have no idea. But look how much they spent! Rachel: Monica, would you calm down? The credit card people said that you only have to pay for the stuff that you bought.

episodes.title: The One With the Ick Factor
episodes.previewText: Monica: Tell him. Rachel: No. Phoebe: Tell him, tell him.

episodes.title: The One With the Birth
episodes.previewText: With Minor Adjustments by: Dan Silverstein Ross: She's not here yet. She's not here. She's having my baby and she's not here. Monica: I'm sure everything's fine. Has her water broke yet?

episodes.title: The One Where Rachel Finds Out
episodes.previewText: Ross: And here's little Ben nodding off... Monica: Awww, look at Aunt Monica's little boy! Phoebe: Oh, look, he's got Ross's haircut!

episodes.title: The One With Ross' New Girlfriend
episodes.previewText: With Minor Adjustments by: Eric Aasen Phoebe: Ok, so this is pretty much what's happened so far. Ross was in love with Rachel since, you know, forever, but every time he tried to tell her, something kind of got in the way, like cats, and Italian guys. Finally Chandler was like "forget about her" but when Ross was in China on his dig, Chandler let it slip that Ross was in love with Rachel. She was like, "Oh my god." So she went to the airport to meet him when he came back, but what she didn't know was, that Ross was getting off the plane with another woman. Uh-Oh! So, that's pretty much everything you need to know. But, enough about us. So, how've you been? Rachel: Oh my god. Oh my god. (She decides to make a break for it.) Excuse me. Move! Move! Emergency! Excuse me! (She tries climbing over a bench and falls down.)

episodes.title: The One With the Breast Milk
episodes.previewText: With Minor Adjustments by: Eric Aasen Monica: (entering from her bedroom carrying a present) Ok, these were unbelievably expensive, and I know he's gonna grow out of them in like, 20 minutes, but I couldn't resist. (There a little pair of Nike shoes.) Phoebe: Oh, look at these! Hey, Ben. Just do it. (Ben starts to cry) Oh my God, oh, ok, was that too much pressure for him?

episodes.title: The One Where Mr. Heckles Dies
episodes.previewText: With Minor Adjustments by: Eric Aasen CHANDLER: Hey. MONICA: So how was Joan?

episodes.title: The One With Phoebe's Husband
episodes.previewText: RACHEL: Mom, would you relax. That was 10 blocks from here and, the, the woman was walking alone at night, I would never do that. Mom, c'mon, stop worrying. This is a safe street, this is a safe building, there's nothing [a pigeon flies in the window and lands on the table] OH MY GOOOD, oh my God, oh I gotta go, I gotta go, I gotta go. [hangs up] OK, that's fine, you just read the paper, I'm gonna get a pot, it's not for you. [grabs a pot and lid] OK, that's fine, read the Family Circus, enjoy the gentle comedy. [puts pot over the pigeon] Aaahh, oh my God, oh my God, oh my God, oh my God, oh my God, oh my God, oh my God, oh my God, aaaaahh. [knock at the door] It's open you guys. STRANGER: Hi. RACHEL: Hi, hi can I help you?

episodes.title: The One With Five Steaks and an Eggplant
episodes.previewText: ROSS: Man, I sure miss Julie. CHANDLER: Spanish midgets. Spanish midgets wrestling. Julie. Ok, yes, I see how you got there. (phone rings) ROSS: You ever figure out what that thing's for?

episodes.title: The One With the Baby on the Bus
episodes.previewText: MONICA: Who da wenny-Benny boy? You the Wenny-wenny-Benny-Benny boy, yes. Don't cry. Don't cry. Why is he still crying? ROSS: Let me hold him for a sec. There. (Ben stops crying) Huh? There we are. MONICA: Maye it's me.

episodes.title: The One Where Ross Finds Out
episodes.previewText: CHAN: OK, what is it about me? Do I not look fun enough? Is there something. . . repellant. . . about me? RACH: So, how was the party? CHAN: Well it couldn't have been worse. A woman literally passed through me. OK, so what is it, am I hideously unattractive?

episodes.title: The One With the List
episodes.previewText: RACH: Ross kissed me. MNCA: Oh my god, oh my god, oh my god! RACH: It was unbelievable!

episodes.title: The One With Phoebe's Dad
episodes.previewText: PHOEBE: Ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh, ooh. Ugly Naked Guy is decorating his tree. Oh my God, you should see the size of his Christmas Balls. JOEY: Hey. CHANDLER: Hey.

episodes.title: The One With Russ
episodes.previewText: RACH: Joey, would you slow down? They're not gonna be sold out of papers at one o'clock in the morning. JOEY: I'm excited! I've never gotten reviewed before. MNCA: You were so amazing as the king. I was really impressed, I was.

episodes.title: The One With the Lesbian Wedding
episodes.previewText: ROSS: Ok. Here's his diaper bag, and his uh, Mr. Winky, and uh...oh, him. Hi! CAROL: So how did everything go? ROSS: Oh, great. Great. There was a projectile, uh, throwing up incident, but he started it.

episodes.title: The One After the Superbowl
episodes.previewText: COMMERCIAL VOICEOVER: Can't get the monkey off your back? Then put it in your mouth... COMMERCIAL VOICEOVER: ...With MonkeyShine Beer. [MonkeyShine theme] MonkeyShine Beer, 'cause it's a jungle out there.] ROSS: That commercial always makes me so sad.

episodes.title: The One With the Prom Video
episodes.previewText: JOEY: Hey. CHANDLER: Hey. Hold on a second. [shoots a goal] Huh? JOEY: Nice, nice. Hey I got somethin' for you. [hands Chandler an envelope.

episodes.title: The One Where Rachel and Ross... You Know
episodes.previewText: JOEY: Alright, no peeking. No peeking, no peeking, no peeking. CHANDLER: Alright, alright, but you better be wearing clothes when I open my eyes. JOEY: Alright open your eyes. [opens his eyes to see two black leather recliners and a big screen TV]

episodes.title: The One Where Joey Moves Out
episodes.previewText: JOEY: Man this is weird. You ever realize Captain Crunch's eyebrows are actually on his hat? CHANDLER: That's what's weird? Joey, the man's been captain of a cereal for the last 40 years. CHANDLER: Waaa-aaah.

episodes.title: The One Where Eddie Moves In
episodes.previewText: JOEY: Huh? So whaddya think? Casa de Joey. Huh? I decorated it myself. ROSS: Get out. ALL: No.

episodes.title: The One Where Dr. Remore Dies
episodes.previewText: AMBER: Oh Drake. DR. REMORE: I'm sorry Amber. It's just like Brad to have to have the last word. ROSS: I'm sorry I'm late, what happened?

episodes.title: The One Where Eddie Won't Go
episodes.previewText: CHANDLER: Hey Eddie. Daahh!! What're you doin' here? EDDIE: Nothin' roomie, just watchin' you sleep. CHANDLER: Why?

episodes.title: The One Where Old Yeller Dies
episodes.previewText: PHOEBE: Hey. Watcha guys doin? RICHARD: Monica's making us watch Old Yeller. PHOEBE: Why are you guys so upset? It's Old Yeller, it's a happy movie.

episodes.title: The One With the Two Bullies
episodes.previewText: JOEY: Hey Monica, why are we watchin' the business channel? MONICA: 'Cause I was going by it the other day and I saw that there was a stock with my initials, MEG, on it and, well, sometimes I have to watch for two or three hours before it comes up again but when it does, it's pretty exciting. RACHEL: Ok honey, you really need a job.

episodes.title: The One With the Two Parties
episodes.previewText: MONICA: So, I'll get candles and my mom's lace tablecloth, and since it's Rachel's birthday, I mean, we want it to be special, I thought I'd poach a salmon. ALL: Ohhh. MONICA: What?

episodes.title: The One With the Chicken Pox
episodes.previewText: RACHEL: Ok, Chandler, Mon, there's only one bananna nut muffin left. MONICA: Oh, I ordered mine first. CHANDLER: Yeah, but I'm, I'm so much faster...

episodes.title: The One With Barry and Mindy's Wedding
episodes.previewText: RACHEL: Hey Joey, how'd the audition go? JOEY: Incredible! I met the director this time and you'll never believe who it was. ALL: Who?

episodes.title: The One With the Princess Leia Fantasy
episodes.previewText: Joey: I'm tellin' ya that girl totally winked at me. All: Did not, she did not wink at you...(sees that their sacred couch is occupied by strangers). Chandler: Huh. (They all leave, dejected)

episodes.title: The One Where No-one's Ready
episodes.previewText: Joey: All right they got water, orange juice, and what looks like cider. (takes a glass from the fridge.) Chandler: Taste it. Joey: (drinks from the glass and puts it back in the fridge) Yep, it's fat. I drank fat!

episodes.title: The One With the Jam
episodes.previewText: Joey: (from bedroom) WHOAA!! Chandler: (going to the bedroom) See Joe, that's why your parents told you not to jump on the bed. Monica: Hey, look at me. I'm making jam, been at it since 4 o'clock this morning.

episodes.title: The One With The Metaphorical Tunnel
episodes.previewText: Host: Welcome everybody, welcome to Amazing Discoveries! Phoebe: Oh, oh! It's on again! Joey: You guys, can we please not watch this all right.

episodes.title: The One With Frank Jr.
episodes.previewText: Chandler: (entering) Hey! Joey: Hey! Chandler: Hey-hey-hey. So what happened? A forest tick you off?

episodes.title: The One With The Flashback
episodes.previewText: Janice: Janice has a question. Who of the six of you has sleep with the six of you? Phoebe: Wow, it’s like a dirty math problem. Ross: I’m sorry the answer there would be...none of us.

episodes.title: The One With the Race Car Bed
episodes.previewText: Ross: So I told Carl, ‘Nobody, no matter how famous their parents are, nobody is allowed to climb on the dinosaur.’ But of course this went in one ear and out..... Rachel: I love how he cares so much about stuff. If I squint I can pretend he’s Alan Alda. Monica: Oh good, another dinosaur story. When are those gonna become extinct?

episodes.title: The One With The Giant Poking Device
episodes.previewText: Rachel: Here you go Pheebs. Who else wants one of my special homemade brownies? Chandler: I will have one. (Ross and him both take one.) Chandler: Okay, I’m not gonna have one.

episodes.title: The One With The Football
episodes.previewText: The Guys: (reacting to a play) Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! Awww! Phoebe: Hey, it’s your Thanksgiving too, y'know, instead of watching football, you could help. The Guys: We will. (they don’t move)

episodes.title: The One Where Rachel Quits
episodes.previewText: Chandler: (reading the comics) Eh..., I don’t, I don’t know. Rachel: What? Chandler: Well, as old as he is in dog years, do you think Snoopy should still be allowed to fly this thing?

episodes.title: The One Where Chandler Can’t Remember Which Sister
episodes.previewText: Joey: Okay, pick a card, any card. (Monica picks one) All right, now memorize it. Show to everybody. Got it? Monica: Um-mm. Joey: All right, give it back to me. (takes the card back, but he looks at the card before he puts it back in the deck, he holds the deck to his forehead, and thinks a little while) 5 of hearts.

episodes.title: The One With All The Jealousy
episodes.previewText: Rachel: (running in from her bedroom, wearing only a towel) Okay. Hey. Umm. Does everybody hate these shoes? Chandler: Oh yeah, but don't worry. I don't think anybody's gonna focus on that as long as your wearing that towel dress. Rachel: (to Ross) Tell him.

episodes.title: The One Where Monica and Richard Are Friends
episodes.previewText: Monica: (to clerk) Hi. Clerk: Six dollars, please. Monica: Six? I just had it for one night. It’s three.

episodes.title: The One With Phoebe’s Ex-Partner
episodes.previewText: Singer: (singing) ‘Cause every time I see your face, I can’t help but fall from grace. I know..... Joey: Wow! This girl is good. Phoebe: Oh-ho yeah! A song with rhyming words. Oo, I never thought of that before.

episodes.title: The One Where Ross and Rachel Take A Break
episodes.previewText: Joey: (to Monica) Hey, how much will you give me to eat this whole jar of olives? Monica: I won’t give you anything, but you’ll owe me 2.95. Joey: Done.

episodes.title: The One The Morning After
episodes.previewText: Joey: (Voice Over) Previously on Friends. Ross: I mean, I don’t feel like I even have a girlfriend anymore. Rachel: You want me to just quit my job so that you can feel like you’ve got a girlfriend?

episodes.title: The One Without The Ski Trip
episodes.previewText: Joey: Can I see the comics? Chandler: This is the New York Times. Joey: Okay, may I see the comics?

episodes.title: The One With The Hypnosis Tape
episodes.previewText: Monica: (to Joey) What’s so funny? Joey: Oh, nothing, no. It’s an acting exercise, I’m practising my fake laugh. Monica: Oh. (she laughs)

episodes.title: The One With The Tiny T-shirt
episodes.previewText: Gunther: Here you go. Rachel: Thank you. Gunther: (In his head) Say Rachel, I was wondering if you’d like to go to a movie with me sometime. As my lover! Nnnsch, to out there. Maybe you’d just like to ah, get something to eat with me sometime? As my lover.

episodes.title: The One With The Dollhouse
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Wait a minute, wait. You’re telling me this actress person is the only woman you ever wanted who didn’t want you back?! Joey: Yeah! Oh my God! (to Chandler) Is this what it’s like to be you? Monica: Wow, you’re really crazy about her, huh?

episodes.title: The One With A Chick. And A Duck
episodes.previewText: Rachel: So who’s idea was it to put everybody in the diner on skates? Monica: Oh, some idiot customer put a suggestion in the suggestion box. Phoebe: Oh my God, they took my idea!

episodes.title: The One With The Screamer
episodes.previewText: Rachel: Oh, Phoebe, are you still on hold? I was supposed to call my Dad back like two hours ago. Phoebe: Oh, yeah, he clipped on, he said call him as soon as you get a chance, he’s at Flimby’s. Rachel: What’s Flimby’s?

episodes.title: The One With Ross's Thing
episodes.previewText: Joey: Hey, wouldn't be cool if our duck and chick had a little baby? We could call it Chuck. Chandler: Or... Dick. Ross: (entering) Hey.

episodes.title: The One With The Ultimate Fighting Champion
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Do you think that there’s a town in Missouri or some place called Sample? And ah, as you’re driving into town there’s-there’s like a sign, and it says “You’re in Sample.” (He says it like urine sample.) Monica: (entering) Hey. All: Hey!

episodes.title: The One At The Beach
episodes.previewText: Chandler: (to Bonnie) So ah, your first sexual experience was with a woman?! Bonnie: All right, I was 15, it was my best friend, Ruth, and we got drunk on that hard cider, and then suddenly, I don’t know, we were, we were making out. Chandler: Tell it again. (pause, we see Rachel is not amused.) Seriously.

episodes.title: The One With The Jellyfish
episodes.previewText: Joey: (lying on a beach towel, recapping what happened in the last episode) Okay, so we went to the beach, because Phoebe found out about this lady who knew her mom and dad, and I don’t really know what happened with that. Phoebe Sr.: (to Phoebe) I’m your mother. Phoebe: Ehh?

episodes.title: The One With The Cat
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Wow! That ripped! That ripped real nice! Joey: How many times do I have to tell you! Ya, turn and sliiiide! Y'know, turn and slide. Chandler: You don’t turn and slide, you throw it out! I’m tired of having to get a tetanus shot every time I get dressed!

episodes.title: The One With The ‘Cuffs
episodes.previewText: Joey: Hey!! We are so in luck! Treeger said that we could have all this cool stuff from the basement. Wait right there. (Goes back into the hall) Chandler: Oh no-no-no, I’m, I’m paddling away! Joey: (Returning carrying a couple of rusted lawn chairs) Huh?!

episodes.title: The One With The Ballroom Dancing
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: Hey! New wallet, huh? Chandler: Yeah, it was time. The old condom ring in the leather just doesn’t say ‘cool’ anymore. Monica: Rachel!

episodes.title: The One With Joey's New Girlfriend
episodes.previewText: Ross: (picking up the slip of paper) Hello! What's this? Oh right its that girl's phone number. (Rachel ignores him) Yeah-yeah, there it is, just a phone number a really hot girl gave me. (He holds it so that Rachel can see it, she continues to ignore him) It's no big deal, I mean it is her home phone number, but...(Rachel still ignores him) Whoa! (Throws it in her lap) Whoa-whoops, I almost lost this baby! Yeah, the lovely Amanda gives me her number and I-I go and drop it. (He waves it in front of Rachel's face. Then suddenly Phoebe has to sneeze and Rachel quickly grabs the slip of paper and gives it to Phoebe for her to sneeze into.) Phoebe: Thank you. Gunther: Rachel?

episodes.title: The One With The Dirty Girl
episodes.previewText: Cheryl: So, thank you for the delicious dinner. Ross: You're welcome for a delicious dinner. Phoebe: Hey what are you guys looking at?

episodes.title: The One Where Chandler Crosses a Line
episodes.previewText: Chandler: (entering in a bathrobe) I just walked in the bathroom and saw Kathy naked! It was like torture! Ross: Y'know if we ever go to war and you’re captured, you’re in for a big surprise. Chandler: It just keeps getting worse and worse! Y'know? I mean it’s bad enough that I’m in love with my roommates girlfriend—which by the way, I think she knows. Because every time we’re in the room together there’s this weird like energy between us. And call me crazy, but I think she likes me too. And now I have seen her naked. I mean at least when I’ve seen her with clothes on, I could imagine her body was like covered in boles or something. But there are no boles, she’s smooth! Smooth! (leaves)

episodes.title: The One With Chandler in a Box
episodes.previewText: Joey: (answering phone) Hello. Chandler: (on phone) Hey, it’s me. I know you can’t stand to be in the same room as me, so I just thought I’d try and apologize over the phone. All I… (Joey hangs up the phone in disgust.) Joey: (answering phone) Hello.

episodes.title: The One Where They’re Gonna PARTY!
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: Okay! Monica: Come on, no peeking! (They are leading the gang out with there hands over their eyes.) Chandler: Our eyes are closed and we’re about to cross the street. Very good.

episodes.title: The One With The Girl From Poughkeepsie
episodes.previewText: Ross: Hey! Chandler, Joey, and Phoebe: Hey! Ross: I’m sorry I’m late, did I miss anything?

episodes.title: The One With Phoebe’s Uterus
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: Oh my God! I can’t believe my little brother is married! Frank: Oh I know!! (Both he and Alice squeal hysterically) Phoebe: You guys, why didn’t you tell me you were eloping?

episodes.title: The One With The Embryos
episodes.previewText: Rachel: What the hell is that?!! (to Monica) What the hell is that? Is that you? (Monica nods her head no, and Rachel realizes what is making that sound.) Ohhhhhhh! (storms over to Chandler and Joey’s with Monica in trail.) Monica: Boy, you are really not a morning person. Rachel: (angrily) BACK OFF!!! (She starts banging on their door.) Get up! Get up! Get up! God damn it! Get up, get up, get up, get up, get up!!

episodes.title: The One With Rachel’s Crush
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Okay, she is the star of the play. And she is my girlfriend! I get to have sex with the star of the play! Ross: People can hear you. Chandler: I know!!

episodes.title: The One With Joey’s Dirty Day
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: (holding a lure) So now, what is this now? Joey: Guggly worm. Phoebe: (laughs and picks up another lure) And this?

episodes.title: The One With All The Rugby
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Y'know, I can't believe I'm getting my nails done! And you said it was gonna be fun! (pause) Which it kinda is. Also, you said there would be other guys here. There are no other guys here! Rachel: Chandler, there’s a guy right over there. (Points to the counter) Chandler: That’s a mailman! That’s our mailman! (Waves to the mailman) (Sarcastic) Hi. How are ya?

episodes.title: The One With The Fake Party
episodes.previewText: Monica: What is it hon? Phoebe: I-I can’t find anything that I want to eat! Everything I eat makes me nauseous! I’m telling you, being pregnant is no piece of cake—ooh! Cake! (Chandler shrugs, and Phoebe grimaces.) No. Monica: Aww, honey I’m sorry.

episodes.title: The One With The Free Porn
episodes.previewText: Mr. Treeger: Ohhh, man!! Joey: (coming in from his bedroom) What is that? Chandler: Treeger’s snaking the shower drain.

episodes.title: The One With Rachel’s New Dress
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: Hey! Chandler: Hey! Wow, it is true what they say, pregnant bellies look like a drum. Phoebe: (not amused) Ha-ha. (She sits down on the couch.) No, it’s just I’m so pregnant that I—my guitar doesn’t fit anymore. So I thought ‘til I’m not, I’m just gonna play all my songs on this drum. It sounds really cool!

episodes.title: The One With All The Haste
episodes.previewText: The Singing Man: (singing, duh) Morning’s here! Sunshine is here! The sky is clear, the morning’s here! The morning’s here! Rachel: HEY!! Do you have to do that? It’s Saturday! The Singing Man: Oh come on! Morning’s here! (Starts singing) Morning’s here! The morning is here! Sunshine is here!

episodes.title: The One With All the Wedding Dresses
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Are you kidding me?! Joey. Joey! Joey! Joey! Joey! Joey! Joey! Joey! Joey! Joey!! Joey: (joining in, in his sleep) Joey. Joey. Joey. Joey! Joey!! Chandler: Oh. Oh, did-did-did I wake you?

episodes.title: The One With The Invitation
episodes.previewText: Episodes Orginally Transcribed by: guineapig, Ruth Curran, Mindy Mattingly Phillips, Josh Hodge, Dan Silverstein, and Eric Aasen. Chandler: Y’know what? It seems like all of the sudden; so much has happened. Joey: I know. Ross is getting married.

episodes.title: The One With The Worst Best Man Ever
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: (angrily) That’s like the tenth time I’ve peed since I’ve been here! Monica: That’s also like the tenth time you told us. Phoebe: Yeah, oh I’m sorry, it must be really hard to hear! I tell ya, it’s a lot easier having three babies play Bringing in the Noise, Bringing in da Funk on your bladder! I’m so sick of being pregnant! The only happiness I get is from a cup of coffee, which of course is decaf, ‘cause—Oh! I’m pregnant!

episodes.title: The One With Ross’s Wedding Parts I and II
episodes.previewText: Part I Written by: Michael Borkow Part II Teleplay by: Shana Goldberg-Meehan & Scott Silveri Part II Story by: Jill Condon & Amy Toomin

episodes.title: The One With Ross's Wedding - Uncut Version
episodes.previewText: Part I Written by: Michael Borkow Part II Teleplay by: Shana Goldberg-Meehan & Scott Silveri Part II Story by: Jill Condon & Amy Toomin

episodes.title: The One After Ross Says Rachel
episodes.previewText: Minister: Friends. Family. We are gathered to celebrate here today the joyous union of Ross and Emily. (Time lapse) Now Ross, repeat after me. I Ross... Ross: I Ross... Minister: Take thee, Emily...

episodes.title: The One With All The Kissing
episodes.previewText: Monica: You look cute in bubbles. Chandler: Ehh, you're just liquored up. Joey: Hey, it's me! I'm comin' in!

episodes.title: The One Hundredth
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: (to the nurse) Hi. Nurse: Hi. Phoebe: Hi, yeah, hi! I'm umm, Phoebe Buffay, and I have babies coming out of me.

episodes.title: The One Where Phoebe Hates PBS
episodes.previewText: Monica: (In a sexy voice) Come in. I've been waiting for you. Rachel: Hi! I just wanna-(sees Monica)-Ahhh!!! Oh my God! (She runs out in horror.) Oh my God! Monica: (pulling on a robe) Okay, I'm sorry! I'm sorry! I-I-I was um, I was taking a nap.

episodes.title: The One With All the Kips
episodes.previewText: Monica: (quietly) Hi! Chandler: (quietly) Hi! (They both start kissing.) Joey: Monica? What time is it?

episodes.title: The One With The Yeti
episodes.previewText: Joey: (entering) Hey! Hey! Hey! Hey!! None of that, not while you're living under my roof! Monica: What?! Joey: Look, just because I know about you two, doesn't mean I like looking at it.

episodes.title: The One Where Ross Moves In
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Are you looking at naked tribe's women? Joey: No, look. (Shows him the magazine.) Chandler: That's a pig.

episodes.title: The One With The Thanksgiving Flashbacks
episodes.previewText: Rachel: Oh Monica that was the best Thanksgiving dinner ever! I think you killed us. Ross: I couldn't possibly eat another bite. Joey: I need something sweet.

episodes.title: The One With Ross's Sandwich
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: What am I sitting on? Chandler: Top of the world? Dock of the bay? (He tries to think of another but can't) I'm out. Phoebe: (taking something out of the couch) Ew-eww!! Undies!

episodes.title: The One With The Inappropriate Sister
episodes.previewText: Joey: What are you doing? Ross: I...reorganized the fridge. See, bottom shelf: meats and dairy. (There’s nothing on the shelf.) Middle shelf: fruits and vegetables. (There’s one lone tomato.) And top shelf: expired products. (The shelf is jammed packed.)

episodes.title: The One With All The Resolutions
episodes.previewText: Jay Leno: (On TV to Dick Clark) Is there any entertainment there? What are people doing? Joey: All right! Here we go! 1999! The year of Joey! Chandler: (deadpan, standing next to Monica) We're very happy for you.

episodes.title: The One With Chandler's Work Laugh
episodes.previewText: Rachel: Come on Joey!!! Joey: Rach, I told you everything I knew last night! Look, it's not that big of a deal, so Monica and Chandler are doing it. Rachel: I can't believe you would say that!

episodes.title: The One With Joey's Bag
episodes.previewText: Monica: I can't believe we've never done this before! It's sooo good! So good for Monica! Chandler: Oh! Look at that, time's up! My turn! Monica: That was a half an hour?

episodes.title: The One Where Everyone Finds Out
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: (looking out the window) Oh hey, you guys, look! Ugly Naked Guy is putting stuff in boxes! Rachel: I'd say from the looks of it; our naked buddy is moving. Ross: Ironically, most of the boxes seem to be labeled clothes.

episodes.title: The One With The Girl Who Hits Joey
episodes.previewText: Ross: Chandler!!! Chandler!!! (He opens the door to the apartment but is stopped by the chain; Chandler and Monica quickly stop making out and try to get dressed.) Chandler, I saw what you were doing through the window! Chandler, I saw what you were doing to my sister! Now get out here! Chandler: (To Monica) Wow! Listen, we had a good run. What was it? Four? Five months? I mean, that's more than most people have in a lifetime! So, good-bye, take care, bye-bye then! (He kisses her and starts to climb out the balcony window.) Monica: What are you doing?!

episodes.title: The One With A Cop
episodes.previewText: Joey: Hey! Chandler: Hey! Monica: Hey!

episodes.title: The One With Rachel's Inadvertant Kiss
episodes.previewText: Rachel: Good, you guys are all here! Ross: Hey! What's up? Rachel: Well, I have a job interview at Ralph Lauren tomorrow!

episodes.title: The One Where Rachel Smokes
episodes.previewText: Joey: Okay, pick a card. Chandler: Okay. (He picks the 9 of Spades) Joey: All right now, memorize it. (Pause) You got it?

episodes.title: The One Where Ross Can't Flirt
episodes.previewText: Ross: Hey! Chandler: Hey! Ross: Wow! You look nice. What's the occasion?

episodes.title: The One With The Ride Along
episodes.previewText: Monica: Okay, guys, listen, don't forget that tomorrow is the day that Emily gets married again, so whatever we do, just try to really keep Ross's mind off of it. Joey: Oh, yeah, good idea. Chandler: Hey man, what's up?

episodes.title: The One With The Ball
episodes.previewText: Gary: (To Phoebe) Would you like some more coffee, baby-doll? Phoebe: I'm fine, thanks. Chandler: (To Monica) Yeah, see, I can't pull of baby-doll can I?

episodes.title: The One With Joey's Big Break
episodes.previewText: Ross: What's going on? Rachel: Well, my eye is a little itchy. Joey: Uhhh, mine too! Yeah.

episodes.title: The One In Vegas
episodes.previewText: Part I Written by: Andrew Reich & Ted Cohen Part II Written by: Greg Malins & Scott Silveri Rachel: Pheebs? Could you get that? Please?

episodes.title: The One After Vegas
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Okay! (Stands up) This is it! (Claps his hands) We're gonna get married! Monica: Are you sure you wanna do this? Ross: Well, hello, Mrs. Ross! (Throws some rice.)

episodes.title: The One Where Ross Hugs Rachel
episodes.previewText: Ross: Hey! Rachel: Hey, so did everything go okay with the annulment? Ross: Oh, yeah, no problems. It’s all taken care of.

episodes.title: The One With Ross’s Denial
episodes.previewText: Chandler: (entering) Hey! Phoebe: Hey! Check it out! This is unbelievable! Joey has been holding his breath for almost four minutes! Joey: (To Chandler) Dude! What are yo—you trying to kill me?!

episodes.title: The One Where Joey Loses His Insurance
episodes.previewText: Rachel: So, which of this kitchen stuff is mine? Monica: This bottle opener. (She grabs it off of the freezer door.) Rachel: And?

episodes.title: The One With Joey’s Porsche
episodes.previewText: Rachel: I cannot believe that you didn’t tell me that we are still married!! Ross: Look I was going to tell you! Rachel: When?! After the birth of our first secret child?! (To All) Ross didn’t get the annulment; we are still married.

episodes.title: The One The Last Night
episodes.previewText: Chandler: (watches Joey for a moment) Okay! (Joey quickly moves the hockey stick so that he’s scratching his back with it.) Listen, I’m gonna be moving out so you will be in charge of paying the rent. Joey: Right! And when is that due? Chandler: First of the month.

episodes.title: The One Where Phoebe Runs
episodes.previewText: With Minor Adjustments by: Eric Aasen Phoebe: Ready? Rachel: Yeah.

episodes.title: The One With Ross’s Teeth
episodes.previewText: Joey: Hey. Chandler: Hi, my name’s Chandler. I just moved in next door and I was wondering if you would be interested in battling me in a post-apoplectic world for control of the galaxies last remaining energy source? Joey: Sure, neighbor come on in.

episodes.title: The One Where Ross Got High
episodes.previewText: Monica: (on phone) Okay, great! Bye. (Hangs up as Chandler enters.) So guess who’s coming to Thanksgiving dinner? Chandler: Sydney Portier? Hehheh. Monica: (not amused by Chandler’s joke) I miss Rachel. (To Chandler) No, my parents.

episodes.title: The One With The Routinue
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Let me ask you, why is everybody using these tiny lights nowadays? I remember when people used to use big lights. Rachel: That’s a good story, Grandpa. Ross: Hey

episodes.title: The One With The Apothecary Table
episodes.previewText: Joey: Hey! Ross: Hey! Joey: Listen, do you guys think I have a chance with Janine?

episodes.title: The One With The Joke
episodes.previewText: Ross: Hey, you’re not going to believe this. I made up a joke and sent it in to Playboy. They printed it! Phoebe: I didn’t know Playboy prints jokes. Ross: Yeah, they print jokes, interviews, hard-hitting journalism. It’s not just about the pictures.

episodes.title: The One With Rachel’s Sister
episodes.previewText: Joey: Okay Rach, that muffin and espresso, $4.50. Ross, double latte, $2.75. Chandler, coffee and a scone, $4.25. And Pheebs, herbal tea, $1.25. So, all together that’s (pauses to figure the total) $12.75. Chandler: This coming from the man who couldn’t split our 80 dollar phone bill in half. Woman: Hi!

episodes.title: The One Where Chandler Can’t Cry
episodes.previewText: Joey: (sees Rachel) Oh, uh, hey Rach. I uh, I was just coming over here to uh… Oh wait, I don’t have to lie to you, you don’t live here anymore. Uh, I’m eating their food. What are you doing? Rachel: Ross is on a date with my sister and they shut the drapes two and a-half-hours ago. Joey: Whoa, I didn’t know we could date your sister!

episodes.title: The One That Could Have Been
episodes.previewText: Part I Written by: Greg Malins & Adam Chase Part II Written by: David Crane & Marta Kauffman Parts I & II Transcribed by: Eric Aasen

episodes.title: The One With The Unagi
episodes.previewText: Ross: Hey, remember when I had a monkey? Chandler: Yeah. Ross: Yeah, what, what was I thinking?

episodes.title: The One Where Ross Dates A Student
episodes.previewText: Ross: Hey! I just got uh, my teacher evaluations! Check out what this one student wrote, "I loved Dr. Geller’s class. Mind blowing lectures! Dr. Geller, you are definitely the hottie of the paleontology department!" Chandler: Ahh, Hotties of the Paleontology Department, there’s a big selling calendar, eh? Rachel: Who wrote it?

episodes.title: The One With Joey’s Fridge
episodes.previewText: Joey: Well that thing is clearing in the way! All right. Ah-ha! (He grabs a screwdriver and starts to attack the compressor, only he causes a small short circuit and shocks himself.) Ah-ah!! Damn fridge! Rachel: Hi Joey, how ya doin’? Joey: Great! Roomie!

episodes.title: The One With Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E.
episodes.previewText: With Scenes Taken From Episodes Transcribed by: Mindy Mattingly Phillips, guineapig, Ruth Curran, Josh Hodge, and Me. Joey: The reactor’s gonna blow in three seconds, we’re never gonna make it! Phoebe: You’ve got to get out of here! Save yourself!

episodes.title: The One Where Ross Meets Elizabeth’s Dad
episodes.previewText: Rachel: Okay, Chandler! Chandler: Okay. Rachel: And your horoscope says, "On the fifth a special someone is going to give you a gift."

episodes.title: The One Where Paul’s The Man
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: (dejected) Hi, you guys. Chandler: Hey! Monica: Hi!

episodes.title: The One With The Ring
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Pheebs, can you help me pick out an engagement ring for Monica? I can’t figure this out! It’s so hard! Should I get her a (turning to each page) Tiffany cut or a Princess cut or a—ah-ah! Paper cut! Phoebe: Now, have you told anyone else? Chandler: No, I don’t want to tell anybody else because I don’t want Monica to find out.

episodes.title: The One With The Proposal
episodes.previewText: Part I Written by: Shana Goldberg-Meehan & Scott Silveri Part II Written by: Andrew Reich & Ted Cohen Parts I and II Transcribed by: Eric Aasen

episodes.title: The One With Monica’s Thunder
episodes.previewText: Ross: Hey, what’s going on? Chandler: Hey. Ross: I found a note on my door, "Come to Monica’s quick, bring champagne and a Three Musketeers bar."

episodes.title: The One With Rachel’s Book
episodes.previewText: Joey: Hey! Ross: Hi! Joey: Who wants French toast?

episodes.title: The One With Phoebe’s Cookies
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Hey, you guys! Ross and Rachel: Hey! Chandler: So, what do you think?

episodes.title: The One With Rachel’s Assistant
episodes.previewText: Mac: (on TV) Well, if we learned one thing today C.H.E.E.S.E. is that cheerleaders and high explosives don’t mix. (Cut to Joey laughing while Rachel, Chandler, and Monica aren’t amused.) C.H.E.E.S.E: You can say that again Mac. Mac: Well, I couldn’t have done it without you buddy. You’re a genius.

episodes.title: The One With The Engagement Picture
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Hey. Monica: What’s the matter? Chandler: Someone on the subway licked my neck! Licked my neck!!

episodes.title: The One With The Nap Partners
episodes.previewText: Monica: Okay, the reason why I asked you guys out to brunch today is because I have been doing some thinking about who should be my maid of honor. Rachel: Oh my God! This is it! (She and Phoebe hold hands.) (To Phoebe) I really hope it’s you! Phoebe: I hope it’s you.

episodes.title: The One With Ross’s Book
episodes.previewText: Joey: Morning! Rachel: Hi! Oh, how was your date last night? Joey: Pretty good.

episodes.title: The One Where Chandler Doesn’t Like Dogs
episodes.previewText: Ross: (entering) Hey everybody! Happy Thanksgiving! Chandler: No, no, no. No-no-no. Joey, Rachel, and Phoebe: Shhhh!

episodes.title: The One With All The Candy
episodes.previewText: Ben: (on the bike) I’m ready! Ross: You sure? Ben: Uh-huh!

episodes.title: The One With the Holiday Armadillo
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Buh-bye. (Hangs up the phone) I just got us reservations at Michelle’s and tickets to the Musicman to celebrate our first holiday season as a betroughed couple. Monica: Betrothed… (Corrects him) Chandler: …betrothed couple.

episodes.title: The One With All The Cheesecakes
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Ohh. Mmm. Rachel: (Comes in the front door and walks towards the kitchen.) Hi. Chandler: Hey, you have got to try this cheesecake.

episodes.title: The One Where They’re Up All Night
episodes.previewText: Monica: (looking up) Ross, when’s this comet thing start? Ross: Well, technically it seven billion years ago… (Well, technically you’d be able to see it for days, well nights; that is if you could see it with all of the bright lights of New York.) All: (groaning) Oh no! Oh no! (They all start to get up a leave.)

episodes.title: The One Where Rosita Dies
episodes.previewText: Joey: Hey. Rachel: Hey. Joey: What are you doing?

episodes.title: The One Where They All Turn Thirty
episodes.previewText: Ross: Happy birthday!!! Monica: Happy birthday!!! All: Rach! Come on! Rach!

episodes.title: The One With Joey’s New Brain
episodes.previewText: Monica: I’m glad you’re here, we have a couple of things to ask you about the wedding ceremony. Rachel: (starting to cry) Ohh… Ross: What’s the matter? You okay?

episodes.title: The One With The Truth About London
episodes.previewText: Ross: Hi. Rachel: Hi! Hi Ben! Ben: Hi.

episodes.title: The One With The Cheap Wedding Dress
episodes.previewText: Monica: So the wedding caterer sent me this list of twelve appetizers and I have to narrow it down to six. Joey: Food? Uh-huh gimme! (She hands him the paper.) Chandler: So did Monica tell you about this great band called the Swing Kings that we’re trying to get to play at the wedding?

episodes.title: The One With Joey’s Award
episodes.previewText: Joey: Hey! You guys! You’re not gonna believe this! I just got off the phone with my agent… Phoebe: Oh my God! (Joey looks at her.) I’m sorry, too soon. You go. Joey: Okay. I got nominated for my part on Days of Our Lives!

episodes.title: The One With Ross and Monica’s Cousin
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: (To Joey) Oh hey! How was your audition? Joey: I’m sorry, do I know you? Phoebe: What are you doing?

episodes.title: The One With Rachel’s Big Kiss
episodes.previewText: Rachel: Hey! Out of all of us, who do you think is gonna get married next? Joey: Probably Monica and Chandler. Woman: (to Gunther) Hi. Could I have a pack of Newport Lights, please?

episodes.title: The One With The Vows
episodes.previewText: Episodes Originally Transcribed by: Eric Aasen, Mindy Mattingly Phillips, and guineapig. Monica: Do you realize that four weeks from today we’re getting married? Four weeks baby!! Four weeks!!! Chandler: Do you realize you get louder each week?

episodes.title: The One With Chandler’s Dad
episodes.previewText: Ross: Hey! Monica: Hey! Ross: Hey uh Mon, I saw the Porsche parked out front, can I get the keys? Thought I’d take that bad boy out for a little spin.

episodes.title: The One With Chandler and Monica’s Wedding
episodes.previewText: Part I Written by: Greg Malins Part II Written by: David Crane & Marta Kauffman Parts I & II Transcribed by: Eric Aasen

episodes.title: The One After "I Do"
episodes.previewText: Photographer: Great. (Takes a picture.) Great! Just give me a sec to change film. Monica: Okay. Ross: (To Monica) Okay, I know I’m not supposed to know, but I do. And I’m so excited for you!

episodes.title: The One With The Red Sweater
episodes.previewText: Rachel: Listen y’know what sir? For the last time, I don’t care what the computer says, we did not take a bag of Mashuga nuts from the mini-bar and we did not watch Dr. Do-Me-A-Little! Joey: (entering) Hey! Phoebe: Oh! Joey uh, were you in our room last night?

episodes.title: The One Where Rachel Tells…
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Hey! Babe! Aren’t you excited we’re going on our honeymoon? Monica: Yeah I am! Chandler: (singing) Bermuda, Bahama, come on pretty mama…

episodes.title: The One With The Videotape
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Wait. Before we go in, I just want you to know I love you. I had a great time on our honeymoon, and I can’t wait to go in there and spend the rest of our life together. Monica: You’re really sticking with the shell necklace huh? (Points to necklace of shells he’s wearing.) Phoebe: Hi!

episodes.title: The One With Rachel’s Date
episodes.previewText: Monica: Okay, now this one is rare, this one is medium well! Now go-go-go! (Phoebe enters) Hey Phoebe! Phoebe: Hey! Monica: Hey how was dinner?!

episodes.title: The One With The Halloween Party
episodes.previewText: Monica: Hey you guys? Ross: What? Monica: I know it’s last minute, but we decided to have a Halloween party.

episodes.title: The One With The Stain
episodes.previewText: Dutch Phrases by: Kenny Walgraef Monica: Hey. Chandler: Hey.

episodes.title: The One With The Stripper
episodes.previewText: Rachel: (coming from the bathroom) Hey Pheebs? Phoebe: Huh? Rachel: I’m having dinner with my dad tomorrow night, do you wanna come?

episodes.title: The One With The Rumor
episodes.previewText: Joey: Hey Rach listen, did you know that during pregnancy your fingers swell up to twice their size and never go back. Rachel: (looking at her fingers) Oh my…God! Let me see that! (Grabs the book from him.) Joey: (laughing) You fall for it every time!

episodes.title: The One With Monica’s Boots
episodes.previewText: Monica: Hey! So what do you think? Chandler: New haircut? (Monica nods ‘No.’) Necklace? (No) Dress? (No) Boots? (Monica nods ‘Yes.’) Boots! Monica: Yes! Now, they’re a little more than I normally spend on boots…or rent (Shows him the receipt.)

episodes.title: The One With Ross’ Big Step Forward
episodes.previewText: Rachel: Phoebe? Phoebe: Yeah? Rachel: Look at that guy by the window, wow!

episodes.title: The One Where Joey Dates Rachel
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: Hey! I got you a present!! Chandler: Oh my goodness! Where did you hide it? Phoebe: I got it for your wedding and I ordered it weeks ago, and it finally got here!

episodes.title: The One Where Chandler Takes a Bath
episodes.previewText: Joey: (thinking) All right. It’s a new day. All that stuff about Rachel, you don’t feel that now. It was crazy! You’re fine. You’re better than fine! You are, as your friend Tony would say, Grrrreat! Everything’s normal! She’s just your friend Rachel! Your friend Rachel. Your friend! Rachel. Rachel: (coming from her room) Hi, sweetie. Joey: (thinking) Hey, it’s your girlfriend, Rachel!

episodes.title: The One With The Secret Closet
episodes.previewText: Monica: (opens the door wearing a robe, but leaves the chain on) Hey, what’s up? Phoebe: Well, I left my guitar here again. Monica: Oh, okay. No problem.

episodes.title: The One With The Birthing Video
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: Oh! Hey, Rach! Rachel: Hi! Hey, Happy Valentine’s Day! Phoebe: Oh, you, too.

episodes.title: The One Where Joey Tells Rachel
episodes.previewText: Lisa Kudrow: (voiceover) Previously on Friends Joey: There’s this woman, that I like. A lot. Well, it’s complicated. She’s with this other guy. For a long time. And I could never do that to the guy, y’know? ’Ccause we’re really good friends. Ross: So, uh, this guy, she used to go out with, is, uh… is he a good guy?

episodes.title: The One With The Tea Leaves
episodes.previewText: Rachel: Joey? Are you in there? Joey: (hearing Rachel and jumping up with his plate) Oh God! That’s Rachel! Monica: Joey, you have to talk to her!

episodes.title: The One In Massapequa
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: Oh, Ross, Mon, is it okay if I bring someone to your parent’s anniversary party? Monica: Yeah. Ross: Sure. Yeah.

episodes.title: The One With Joey’s Interview
episodes.previewText: Episodes Orginally Transcribed by: Eric Aasen, guineapig, Josh Hodge, Aaron D. Howard-Miller, and Kiza Abuzahra. Rachel: Hi! Ross: Hey!

episodes.title: The One With The Baby Shower
episodes.previewText: Rachel: (entering) Hi! Monica: Hey! Phoebe: Hey!

episodes.title: The One With The Cooking Class
episodes.previewText: Ross: Hey you guys I got some bad news. (He sets the stack of papers down on the table.) Phoebe: Well that’s no way to sell newspapers. Why don’t you try, "Extra! Extra! Read all about it!" Ross: No, Monica’s restaurant got a horrible review in the Post. (They all gasp.) I didn’t want her to see it, so I ran around the neighborhood and bought all the copies I could find. (He hands the paper to Phoebe and they all read it.)

episodes.title: The One Where Rachel Is Late
episodes.previewText: Ross: Hey! What are you guys looking at? Joey: Oh, it’s a poster for that World War I movie that I’m in, check it out. Ross: Yeah? Wow! It looks really violent!

episodes.title: The One Where Rachel Has A Baby
episodes.previewText: Part I Written by: Scott Silveri Part II Written by: David Crane & Marta Kauffman Parts I & II Transcribed by: Eric Aasen

episodes.title: The One Where No One Proposes
episodes.previewText: Rachel: Joey. Rachel: (seeing the ring) Oh my God. (Pause) Okay. Rachel: So uh…I guess we should…make it official huh?

episodes.title: The One Where Emma Cries
episodes.previewText: Ross: You said you’d marry Joey? Rachel: Okay you have to realize, I was exhausted, I was emotional, I would have said yes to anybody. Like that time you and I got married! (Pause) I’m not helping. Ross: So you said yes to him, and you just had our baby?

episodes.title: The One With The Pediatrician
episodes.previewText: Rachel: Hi! Ross: Hey! So what's the big news you had us rush all the way over here for? Chandler: Okay, our news. My company has asked me to head up our office in Tulsa , so as of Monday I'm being officially relocated.

episodes.title: The One With The Sharks
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: Oh hey Ross oh I'm so glad someone's here could you zip me up? Ross: sure. Phoebe: Thank you. Can you believe no-one between my apartment and here offered to do that for me?

episodes.title: The One With Phoebe�s Birthday Dinner
episodes.previewText: Phoebe: Oh hey you guys, I couldn�t get a reservation for the night of my birthday, so we have to do dinner Thursday night instead. Joey: Thursday? But that�s Halloween. Phoebe: So?

episodes.title: The One With The Male Nanny (200th episode)
episodes.previewText: Russian to Roman alphabet: Gabriela Horber Chandler: (picking up the telephone, answering it with a frog in his throat) Hello? (he clears his throat, but he still has the same frog in his throat when he speaks again) Hello? Monica: (in her apartment, screaming) I LOVE MY NEW JOB!

episodes.title: The One With Ross's Inappropriate Song
episodes.previewText: Ross: And that's why, no matter what mommy says, we really were on a break. (baby talk) Yes we were! Yes we were! (picks Emma up) Come here gorgeous. (puts her on his knees and talks to her) Oh! Look at you! You are the cutest little baby ever! You're just a... a little bitty baby, you know that? But you've got... (in a softer voice) You've got big beautiful eyes... Yes you do... and a... and a big round belly. (emphasises the B's) Big baby butt! I like big butts. (raps) I like big butts and I cannot lie / you other brothers can't deny / when a girl walks in with an itty, bitty, waist / and a round thing in your face you get...(Emma laughs) Oh my God, Emma... you're laughing! Oh my God, you've never done that before, have you? You never done that before... Daddy made you laugh, huh? Well, daddy and Sir Mix Alot... What? What? You... you wanna hear some more? Uhm...(raps) My anaconda don't want none / unless you got buns hon... (Emma laughs again and Ross looks worried) I'm a terrible father! Chandler: Hi! Joey: Hey... hey listen... What do you guys know about investments?

episodes.title: The One With Rachel's Other Sister
episodes.previewText: Monica: Hey Hon, could you help me get the plates down? Chandler: Yeah. Hey, here's an idea, why don't we use our wedding china today? Monica: No, I think we should save our china for something really special. Like if the Queen of England comes over.

episodes.title: FRIENDS
episodes.previewText: Transcript by: David Buehrle JO LYNN: This kitty is Mittens and this one is Fitzhugh, and this little guy in the cat condo is Jinkies. CHANDLER: Yep.� That's a lot of cats Jo Lynn.� Single are ya?

episodes.title: The One With Christmas In Tulsa
episodes.previewText: Aired: 12/12/2002 Phoebe: ...sprang to his sleigh, to his team gave a whistle; Joey: (impressed) Wow, that was great! You really wrote that?

episodes.title: THE ONE WHERE RACHEL GOES BACK TO WORK
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Hey! Monica: Good morning, Tiger! I'm making you a nice big breakfast so you can keep up your strength for tonight. You're gonna get me good and pregnant. Chandler: I've got nowhere to go this morning. I'm unemployed! I don't know what I'm gonna do with my life.

episodes.title: Untitled Document
episodes.previewText: Aired: 16/1/2003 Chandler: Hey Joey: Hey. So where's Mon?

episodes.title: The One Where Monica Sings
episodes.previewText: Aired: 30/01/2003 Chandler: Hey! Ross: Yeah! Yeah! OK! Sure! Look! Can we...can we talk about what happened here last night?

episodes.title: 914 The One With the Blind Dates
episodes.previewText: Joey: Morning, roomie! Rachel: Hey! You remembered to put clothes on this morning. Joey: Fifth day's a charm.

episodes.title: The One With The Mugging
episodes.previewText: Chandler: (excited) Guys, guys, I've got great news! Guess what… Joey: Uh, ah, Monica's pregnant?! Monica: (shocked) Really? (She looks around, suddenly embarrassed) Let's get past the moment.

episodes.title: The One With The Boob Job
episodes.previewText: Chandler: Did you see our bank statement? Can this be right? Monica: I know...God. I haven't seen my savings take a hit like this since I was a kid and they came up with double-stuffed Oreos. What happened to all our money? Chandler: I'm not sure what they did, but I'm inclined to blame Enron.

episodes.title: The One With The Memorial Service
episodes.previewText: Aired: 3/13/2003 Chandler: Hey! Ready to go? Ross: Oh yeah, let me just finish this.

episodes.title: The one with the lottery
episodes.previewText: Teleplay: Sherry Bilsing - Graham & Ellen Plummer Story: Brian Buckner & Sebastian Jones Joey: Monica, hey, can I borrow the Porsche?

episodes.title: The one with Rachel's dream
episodes.previewText: Teleplay: Mark Kunerth Story: Dana Klein Joey: (talking to a pineapple in his hand) God, you're beautiful...why are we fighting this?You know you want it to happen as much as I do.

episodes.title: The One With The Soap Opera Party
episodes.previewText: Teleplay: Andrew Reich & Ted Cohen Story: Shana Goldberg-Meehan Joey: (enters the room) Hey, you guys, what are you doing tomorrow night?

episodes.title: The one with the fertility test
episodes.previewText: Teleplay: Robert Carlock Story: Scott Silveri Monica: It's so weird, how did Joey end up kissing Charlie last night? I thought you'd end up kissing Charlie.

episodes.title: The one with the donor
episodes.previewText: Charlie: (while Joey's giving her a massage) Oh! That feels sooo good! Rachel: (speaking to herself and reading Cosmopolitan) Oh, lucky me! Coffee and a live sex show! Charlie: I'm sorry, what?

episodes.title: 924 - The one in Barbados
episodes.previewText: Part 1 written by: Shana Goldberg-Meehan & Scott Silveri Part 2 written by: Marta Kauffman & David Crane Joey: (entering) Hey! I'm all packed and ready to go!

episodes.title: The One After Joey And Rachel Kiss
episodes.previewText: Monica: Oh, the way you crushed Mike at ping pong was such a turn-on.You wanna...? (plays with her finger on Chandlers chest) Chandler: You know, I'd love to, but I'm a little tired. Monica: I'll put a pillowcase over my head.

episodes.title: The One Where Ross Is Fine
episodes.previewText: Joey: Okay, Ross, I realise that you didn't expect to walk in and see that, but.. Let me explain, okay? Rachel: We weren't doing anything! Joey: Rach, he just saw us.

episodes.title: The One With Ross' Tan
episodes.previewText: Produced by: Robert Carlock and Wendy Knoller Chandler: So, you and Rachel tonight, huh? Joey: Yeah. It's actually our first official date

episodes.title: The One With The Cake
episodes.previewText: Produced by: Robert Carlock and Wendy Knoller Monica: (she enters) Hey guys! Ross, Rachel and Chandler: Hey!

episodes.title: The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-sits
episodes.previewText: Produced by: Robert Carlock and Wendy Knoller Rachel: You know, I'm thinking about letting Emma have her first cookie. Joey: Her first cookie? She has cookies all the time!

episodes.title: The One With Ross' Grant
episodes.previewText: Produced by: Robert Carlock and Wendy Knoller Phoebe: (she enters) Hey... All: Hey!

episodes.title: The One With The Home Study
episodes.previewText: Produced by: Robert Carlock and Wendy Knoller Ross: Hey you guys! Phoebe: Hey!

episodes.title: The One With The Late Thanksgiving
episodes.previewText: Produced by: Robert Carlock & Wendy Knoller Monica: Hey guys! Rachel: Hi!

episodes.title: The One With The Birth Mother
episodes.previewText: Produced by: Robert Carlock and Wendy Knoller Chandler: Hi! Ross: Hey!

episodes.title: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
episodes.previewText: Produced by: Wendy Knoller Flashback clips transcribed by: Guineapig, Dan Silverstein, Ruth Curran, Eric Aasen and Mindy Mattingly Phillips, and compiled by Eleonora. Monica: (really excited) Mmh... this cake is amazing!

episodes.title: The One Where The Stripper Cries
episodes.previewText: Produced by: Robert Carlock & Wendy Knoller Joey: Hey guys! Monica: Hey, let me tell them!

episodes.title: The One With Phoebe's Wedding
episodes.previewText: Produced by: Robert Carlock & Wendy Knoller Phoebe: Oh, hey Joey. Joey: Uh, hey.

episodes.title: The One Where Joey Speaks French
episodes.previewText: Produced by: Robert Carlock & Wendy Knoller Phoebe: Hi All: Hey! Hi!

episodes.title: The One With Princess Consuela
episodes.previewText: Produced by: Robert Carlock & Wendy Knoller Mike: (raising his glass) Thank you guys for having us over. Phoebe: Oh! Yeah, this is fun, couples night.

episodes.title: The One Where Estelle Dies
episodes.previewText: Produced by: Robert Carlock & Wendy Knoller Jennifer: Previously on Friends... Chandler: How did the job stuff go?

episodes.title: The One With Rachel's Going Away Party
episodes.previewText: Produced by: Robert Carlock & Wendy Knoller Joey: All right, all right, all right, let's play one more time, ok? And remember, if I win you do not move to Paris. Rachel: Ok! Can't believe I'm risking this again, but you're on! All right Joe, you remember the rules! Heads I win, tails you lose.

episodes.title: The Last One
episodes.previewText: Jennifer Aniston (V.O.): Previously on Friends. Monica: Erica, are you okay? Erica: Yeah, you know, maybe I ate too much. I keep getting these stomach-aches. They come and go like every few minutes.
